name: BLUE DOLPHIN ENERGY CO
business: Blue Dolphin is an independent downstream energy company operating in the Gulf Coast region of the U.S. Its operations primarily consist of a light sweet-crude, 15,000-bpd crude distillation tower, and approximately 1.25 million bbls of petroleum storage tank capacity in Nixon, Texas.

exposures.sentence: The company is an independent downstream energy company operating in the Gulf Coast region of the U.S.
